items.name: Sword of Glowing Hope
items.description: Even in the deepest darkness, there is hope in the flash of my blade. This sword is lit up so it's bright in dark places and slightly glows. Slash at your enemies dealing 17 damage per hit. Upon slashing enemies, sparks emit out of the sword. Anybody killed will burst into neon green flame particles and vanish.

items.name: Blizzard Striker
items.description: Everywhere you go, the freezing snow follows. Anyone who gets close to you while you are wielding this sword will lose health due to the pain of being near your icy cold weapon.  Click to slash at your enemies, dealing around 15 damage per hit. There is a 20% chance your enemy will freeze into a block of ice for 15 seconds. This disables control over his character, making him unable to move and very vulnerable to your frozen attacks.  Let it go, indeed!
